allow: PowerShell("V Todos los procesos Node detenidos")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('src/app/pos/page.tsx', 'utf8'\); if\(content.match\(/pollPaidOrders|getTimeSinceCreation|paidOrdersBox|notificationMessage/g\)\) console.log\('✓ All key additions found'\); else console.log\('✗ Missing key additions'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('src/app/pos/page.tsx', 'utf8'\); const open = \(content.match\(/\\{/g\)||[]\).length; const close = \(content.match\(/\\}/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\('Braces: ' + open + ' open, ' + close + ' close - ' + \(open === close ? '✓ Balanced' : '✗ Unbalanced'\)\);")
